programme.sub-title: O homem possuído por um espírito maligno
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E01

programme.title: 2014. Jotaro volta à vida normal, mas esconde o que Joseph chama de "Stand". A caminho da escola, o mesmo Jotaro se machuca e conhece um aluno chamado Kakyoin. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E02

programme.title: 2014. Jotaro ignora os protestos de Joseph e tenta usar seu Stand para impedir que DIO continue controlando o cérebro de Kakyoin. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E03

programme.title: 2014. Kakyoin ataca um Stand sem saber quem é o seu usuário. Jotaro e seus aliados encontram um dos assassinos a mando de DIO no voo para o Egito. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E04

programme.title: 2014. A vitória parece certa quando Avdol usa seus poderes contra o assassino Polnareff, que tem a mente controlada por DIO. Quem será o vencedor desta batalha? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E05

programme.title: 2014. Jotaro e seus aliados viajam até Singapura pelo mar. Um Stand com usuário desconhecido ataca Jotaro assim que um passageiro clandestino é encontrado no navio. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E06

programme.title: 2014. O grupo de Jotaro encontra um orangotango em um cargueiro que parece abandonado. Durante uma busca no barco, eles se deparam com algo misterioso. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E07

programme.title: 2014. O grupo de Jotaro chega ao hotel em Singapura, mas Polnareff cai direto na armadilha de um usuário de Stand ao entrar no quarto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E08

programme.title: 2014. Jotaro começa a desconfiar que Kakyoin esteja possuído quando ele age de modo estranho e espanca brutalmente um ladrão em Singapura. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E09

programme.title: 2014. Polnareff parte sozinho para vingar a irmã depois de ser atacado por um estranho Stand que só pode ser visto no reflexo de um espelho. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: O Imperador e o Enforcado – Parte 1
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E10

programme.title: 2014. Kakyoin tenta convencer Polnareff a fugir quando descobre que o aliado está enfrentando uma batalha perdida contra o Stand inimigo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: O Imperador e o Enforcado – Parte 2
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E11

programme.title: 2014. Algo estranho está crescendo no braço de Joseph. Quando um médico tenta retirá-lo, um rosto aparece no tumor e declara ser um Stand. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E12

programme.title: 2014. Jotaro e seu grupo ultrapassam um carro em uma estrada nas montanhas. Logo em seguida, Polnareff vê um caminhão no sentido contrário. Será que vai dar tempo de desviar? Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E13

programme.title: 2014. Jotaro e seus aliados desconfiam que exista um Stand por perto quando encontram um cadáver em uma tranquila cidade do Paquistão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E14

programme.title: 2014. Polnareff é atacado por um exército de zumbis após descobrir que a velhinha responsável pelo hotel é uma usuária de Stand. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E15

programme.title: 2014. Jotaro e seus aliados enfrentam um assassino cruel, que segue as ordens de DIO para matar sem um pingo de hesitação. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E16

programme.title: 2014. Kakyoin e Polnareff descobrem um Stand inimigo capaz de atacar as células cerebrais quando mandam seus Stands para a cabeça de Joseph. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E17

programme.title: 2014. Jotaro e seus aliados atravessam um deserto em que o Sol nunca se põe e a temperatura aumenta a níveis insuportáveis. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka, Yûto Nakano, Yûna Watanabe, Rio Sasaki Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda, Hiroshi Nagahama
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E18

programme.title: 2014. Kakyoin sonha com um parque de diversões onde se ouve o choro de um bebê. De volta ao mundo real, um bebê aparece como passageiro do avião em que está a equipe de Jotaro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E19

programme.title: 2014. Ninguém leva a preocupação de Kakyoin com o bebê a sério, mas a verdade logo vem à tona quando eles vão parar no mundo dos pesadelos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E20

programme.title: 2014. Jotaro e seu grupo encontram o pai de Avdol em uma ilha remota, mas o homem vive sozinho e não quer contato com ninguém. Polnareff descobre uma lâmpada estranha. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E21

programme.title: 2014. O Stand que surge da lâmpada atende ao terceiro desejo de Polnareff e ressuscita Avdol, mas o ex-defunto só quer saber de acabar com o autor do desejo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E22

programme.title: 2014. Jotaro e seu grupo vão ao Egito em um submarino para enfrentar DIO, mas uma caneca de café passa por uma estranha transformação quando eles se aproximam do continente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E23

programme.title: 2014. Quando precisam sair do submarino e escapar do Stand inimigo, Jotaro e seu grupo encontram o que parecem ser dois túneis embaixo d'água. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E24

programme.title: 2015. Um helicóptero aterrissa na frente de Jotaro e seu grupo no Egito, mas não parece trazer a ajuda que Joseph pediu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: Iggy, o louco, e N'Doul, o deus Geb – Parte 1
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E25

programme.title: 2015. Avdol cria um plano para se defender do Stand, mas o inimigo está atento. Iggy, que deveria ajudar o grupo, cai no sono bem no meio da luta. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: Iggy, o louco, e N'Doul, o deus Geb – Parte 2
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E26

programme.title: 2015. Kakyoin e Avdol procuram tratamento médico enquanto os outros homens entram em um café e são recebidos por dois irmãos usuários de Stand. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.sub-title: O Khnum do Ongo e o Thoth do Bongo
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E27

programme.title: 2015. Um jovem chamado Chaka tem uma mudança súbita de personalidade depois de encontrar uma espada misteriosa. Jotaro e seu grupo viajam para o Cairo. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E28

programme.title: 2015. Polnareff percebe que a espada de Chaka é um Stand quando é atacado por seu barbeiro. O problema é que a espada está mais poderosa desde a última luta. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E29

programme.title: 2015. Jotaro e seus aliados chegam à cidade de Luxor, e Joseph leva um choque ao tocar uma estranha pedra com uma tomada elétrica. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Kazuyuki Okitsu, Tomokazu Sugita, Takehito Koyasu, Youji Ueda, Yoku Shioya, Takuya Satou, Atsuko Tanaka Diretor: Naokatsu Tsuda
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure - T02E30

programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Crowned and Crusted Flavor!
programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Get Brunched Up!
programme.desc: Chef teaches viewers how to remake world-famous dishes and cocktails with a twist using local ingredients.

programme.title: Twisted Dish - Who Put the Chicken in the Pineapple?
programme.desc: Chef Jay twists up the classic American fried rice staple by subbing cauliflower and tossing in tropical flavors like pineapple and fresh vegetables and spices; ginger salad is the perfect compliment to this remix on pineapple fried rice.

programme.title: My Other Mother
programme.desc: Adopted as a child, an anchorwoman (Essence Atkins) reconnects with her birth mother (Lynn Whitfield) and extended family when she attends the funeral of her father.

programme.title: Lyfe's Journey
programme.desc: A family man makes a mistake that changes his life forever. Now he must start a journey to forgiveness that will bring him back to love, family and faith.

programme.title: Family Time - She's Got Game
programme.desc: Lisa gives relationship advice to Tony's friends.

programme.title: Family Time - The Things We Do for Love
programme.desc: Donnie announces he's getting married and wants Tony to be a witness; Lisa makes some lifestyle changes to improve her health.

programme.title: Family Time - Pushing Buttons
programme.desc: Lisa and Tony make a bet to see who has the shorter fuse; Devin becomes an online entrepreneur.

programme.title: Family Time - Head of House
programme.desc: When the Stallworths have an unexpected visitor, they learn of a vicious crime that took place in their home years ago.

programme.title: Family Time - Unhappy Anniversary
programme.desc: Tony attempts to spark the flame of romance for his and Lisa's upcoming anniversary. Lisa takes a hands-on approach to being in her children's life.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Love Bug
programme.desc: Bernie tries to scare away Vanessa's new boyfriend but realizes what a good role model he is for Jordan; Wanda has trouble letting go of her old shoes.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - It's a Wonderful Wife
programme.desc: Wanda disrupts Bernie's writing process as he prepares for an appearance on The Ellen DeGeneres Show.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Family Reunion
programme.desc: Relatives pester Bernie at a family barbecue; Bernie quashes Vanessa's flirtation with a distant cousin.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Droobie or Not Droobie
programme.desc: Bryana is upset when Bernie takes a villainous role opposite her favorite character, a friendly dinosaur; Jordan sells candy bars at school.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - J-O-R-D-A-N Spells Funny
programme.desc: Jordan tries comedy as a way of overcoming stage fright; Vanessa makes a documentary about her home life.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Brush With Greatness
programme.desc: Romeo (Merlin Santana) uses Sophia's (Tracy Vilar) painting to win first place in an art contest; Cedric (Cedric The Entertainer) goes on a shopping spree.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Loose Lips Sink Friendships
programme.desc: Romeo (Merlin Santana) insults Sophia (Tracy Vilar) and then scrambles to make amends before he can make romance at the dance. With Steve Harvey.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Papa Don't Take No Mess
programme.desc: Romeo (Merlin Santana) must learn how to stand up to his father (Hector Maisonette); a mouse invades Steve and Cedric's (Steve Harvey, Cedric The Entertainer) apartment.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Play's Not the Thing
programme.desc: Sophia wins the role of Juliet in her school's production of Romeo and Juliet, but Romeo is not chosen to play opposite her.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Here Comes the Judge
programme.desc: When Steve's students take him court for a classroom injustice, he goes before TV's Judge Greg Mathis.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - House Party
programme.desc: Cedric and Lovita pressure apartment-sitting Romeo to throw a party while Steve and Regina are out of town.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Not the Best Man
programme.desc: Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) is prompted to tell Steve (Steve Harvey) how she really feels about him while at her best friend's wedding.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Addicted to Love and Whatnot
programme.desc: Regina agrees to a date with Steve's friend (Jonathan Slocum) if Steve will return the favor to one of hers.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Last Dance
programme.desc: Steve tries to help Regina overcome painful prom memories; Bullethead wins a date with a celebrity (Teena Marie) in a radio contest.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Love Is in the Air
programme.desc: Cedric and Lovita (Cedric the Entertainer, Terri J. Vaughn) conspire to bring the romantically impaired Steve and Regina (Steve Harvey, Wendy Raquel Robinson) together.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - The Negotiator
programme.desc: The kids boycott the student-faculty talent show after the childish adults become a tad too competitive.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - After the Fall
programme.desc: The gang is interviewed for a TV documentary about Steve's career path from RAndB performer to vice principal.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - You Got Served
programme.desc: Bernie is sued for being a negligent parent after a birthday bash for Bryana results in broken bones.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - I Don't Wanna Be a Playa No More
programme.desc: When Jordan develops a crush on a girl at school, Bernie takes it upon himself to teach Jordan how to be a player and get the girl.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Big Picture
programme.desc: Jordan's prank anonymous phone calls have surprising consequences.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Music Mac
programme.desc: When Vanessa surprises everyone with her musical talent, Isaac Hayes offers Bernie advice on how to nurture it.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - The Iberian Pig
programme.desc: A do-it-yourself sibling trio serving Spanish cuisine.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Little Bear
programme.desc: Finding out why this restaurant calls itself Michelin Tire style dining, bringing Szechuan and Jewish cuisines to an innovative plate of incredible flavor.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Pit Boss BBQ
programme.desc: Host Zak Wallace takes a trip down memory lane and gets a taste of Hapeville's finest.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - This Is It!
programme.desc: Celebrating the 40th anniversary of the largest Black-owned chain of Southern comfort food in the Southeast with host Zak Wallace.

programme.title: My Dad's a Soccer Mom
programme.desc: Cut from his NFL football team, a man starts bonding with his young daughter (Skai Jackson) and encourages her to play soccer.

programme.title: She's Not Our Sister
programme.desc: After three sisters bury their father, family secrets are revealed that will alter their lives forever. But things really take a turn when a will is discovered that reveals that things are not as black and white as they thought them to be.

programme.title: Family Time - Stallworth vs. Stallworth vs. Stallworth
programme.desc: With Tony and Lisa at odds, Ebony fears disappointing them and takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Family Time - No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Even with Ebony's return, tempers continue to flare between Tony and Lisa.

programme.title: Family Time - Thanks For Giving
programme.desc: Devin makes a new friend and shows the real meaning of the season.

programme.title: Family Time - Daddie Donnie
programme.desc: When Tony shares common interests with Ebony, Devin turns to Uncle Donnie for quality time; Lisa is swindled into purchasing a time-share.

programme.title: Family Time - Every Cloud Has A Silver Lining
programme.desc: Tony believes Rachel and Lori are trying to make a pass at him; Lisa thinks her new Spanish tutor is trying to teach her more than the language of love.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Make Room for Caddy
programme.desc: Despite Bernie's offer to buy him a car, Wanda's father cannot get along with him; showing when they all met.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Saving Sergeant Tompkins
programme.desc: Bernie realizes he may have been too truthful when telling Jordan about his father; he amends the truth to make Jordan think well of his father.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - It's Mac-ademic
programme.desc: Bernie volunteers as a teacher's helper to assess the teaching methods used at Bryana's school; Wanda is at wits' end trying to reason with Vanessa and Jordan.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Getaway
programme.desc: The family goes to San Diego for a relaxing vacation; Bernie, unable to relax, goes to Las Vegas for some gambling and debauchery.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Easy Rider
programme.desc: A motorcycle accident changes Bernie's perspective about protecting the kids; Jordan is caught trying to sell Bernie's girlie magazines to other boys at school.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Big Brothers
programme.desc: Cedric (Cedric The Entertainer) turns Steve (Steve Harvey) on to being a Big Brother, but it turns out to be more than Steve can handle.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Hi-Top Reunion
programme.desc: Steve's old singing group reunites for an awards show performance, but Cedric has to fill in when a member gets sick.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Coming to Chicago
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) hurts Regina's (Wendy Raquel Robinson) feelings when he has a fling with an old flame. Guest star Brian McKnight plays himself.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - African-American Me
programme.desc: Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) asks Steve (Steve Harvey) to back up her church choir on piano.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Okan
programme.desc: Chef Bernard Bennett brings the African diaspora to fine dining with West African and Caribbean-inspired dishes, such as djon djon noodles and pork belly griot; Okan honors a legacy that Savannah knows, one of resilience, rhythm and reinvention.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Klom Klom
programme.desc: In a quiet corner of Savannah, Klom Klom Thai has become a magnet for locals and celebrities alike; chef Ann Healy and PJ introduce rare Northern Thai dishes like duck Chiang Mai khao soy and boat noodles that aren't easy to find.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Secret Lovers
programme.desc: When Bullethead catches Steve and Regina in a compromising position, students start gossiping about their once-secret affair.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Do Not Duplicate
programme.desc: Lovita convinces Steve to give Regina a key to his apartment instead of jewelry, but Regina is unimpressed with the gesture.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - E-Male Problems
programme.desc: Steve explains his reasons for excluding Regina from a dinner party with his parents in an e-mail that inadvertently gets sent to her.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Knit Picking
programme.desc: Steve is rattled when Regina pulls out all the stops for their one-month anniversary, including a romantic dinner.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Narobia's Grits And Gravy
programme.desc: Step into Narobia's, and you're stepping into a family reunion; chef Renée Reid and daughter Sieda serve up classics like liver and onions and shrimp and grits drenched in their signature gravy; it's more than breakfast, it's history on a plate.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Lili's Restaurant
programme.desc: Chef Mir Ali brings his global upbringing to the table at Lili's, named after his daughter; this Savannah gem fuses Southern comfort with South Asian and French influences, crafting dishes like curry crab cakes and tandoori-spiced lamb.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Walk Like a Man
programme.desc: Bernie sees children walking to school on their own and decides it is time for Jordan to do the same, despite Wanda's objections.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Father Knows Best
programme.desc: When a man arrives from Chicago claiming to be Bryana's father, Bernie is cautiously supportive.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Wrestling With a Sticky Situation
programme.desc: When Jordan joins the wrestling team, he overeats and finds himself in a weight class in which he is outmatched.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Marathon Mac
programme.desc: When Bernie agrees to participate in a celebrity marathon, Vanessa declares that she will finish the race ahead of him.

programme.title: Grudge Match (2013)
programme.desc: A boxing promoter (Kevin Hart) offers two rival boxers (Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone) the chance to come out of retirement for one final bout.

programme.title: Gladiator (2000)
programme.desc: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

programme.title: Ida Red (2021)
programme.desc: Crime boss Ida "Red" Walker turns to her son, Wyatt, to pull off one last heist to get out of prison. However, with the FBI closing in, Wyatt must soon choose between family and freedom.

programme.title: The Corrupted (2019)
programme.desc: Released from prison, a talented boxer wants nothing more than to reconnect with his young son and live a quiet life. But when his brother gets on the wrong side of a shady developer, he must risk everything to save his sibling before it's too late.

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part 2 (1981)
programme.desc: Mrs. Voorhees' son Jason is waiting when another load of teens (Amy Steel, John Furey, Adrienne King) tries to make a buck at Camp Crystal.

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part V: A New Beginning (1985)
programme.sub-title: Friday the 13th Part V: A New Beginning (1985)
programme.desc: Teens (Melanie Kinnaman, Shavar Ross) flee and use a chain saw against someone wearing slasher Jason's hockey mask.

programme.title: The Warrior (2001)
programme.desc: A swordsman (Irfan Khan) must outrun a despot's henchmen after he renounces violence and heads for the Himalayas.

programme.title: Just Another Immigrant: Romesh at the Greek
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan, a successful comedian in England, moves his entire family to Los Angeles to make it as a comedian in America; he then takes the drastic step of performing his first ever U.S. stand-up show at the historic Greek Theatre.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact (1996)
programme.desc: Picard (Patrick Stewart), Riker (Jonathan Frakes) and the others set off to stop the half-robot Borg from sabotaging the first warp drive flight in 2063.

programme.title: The Return (2024)
programme.desc: After 20 years away, Odysseus washes up on the shores of Ithaca. The king finds much has changed since he left to fight in the Trojan War. No longer the mighty warrior his people remember, Odysseus must face his past to save his family.

programme.title: Heist 88 (2023)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind decides to pull one last job before going to prison and recruits a group of young bank employees to steal millions in a daring and brazen assault on the U.S. banking system.

programme.title: Walking Out (2017)
programme.desc: When a city teen travels to Montana to go hunting with his estranged father, the trip becomes a battle for survival when they encounter a grizzly bear.

programme.title: Outlaw Posse (2024)
programme.desc: In 1908 an outlaw returns from years of hiding in Mexico to claim stolen gold hidden in the hills of Montana.

programme.title: Reindeer Games (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.title: Memories of Murder (2003)
programme.desc: An urban detective (Kim Sang-kyung) and two rural policemen (Song Kang-ho, Kim Roi-ha) investigate a series of brutal killings in a small town.

programme.title: Friday the 13th (1980)
programme.desc: The reopening of Camp Crystal Lake spells murder and mayhem for a group of sexually promiscuous counselors.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Last Movie (2024)
programme.desc: Cheech Marin and Tommy Chong discuss their lifelong friendship and popularity as a comedic duo. Features interviews, sketches and never-before-seen footage spanning their five-decade career.

programme.title: Harold & Kumar Go to White Castle (2004)
programme.sub-title: Harold & Kumar Go to White Castle (2004)
programme.desc: After smoking marijuana, two roommates (John Cho, Kal Penn) scour New Jersey to satisfy their hunger for hamburgers.

programme.title: Strange Wilderness (2008)
programme.desc: The hosts (Steve Zahn, Allen Covert) of a TV wildlife program hope to save their show from cancellation by finding the legendary Bigfoot.

programme.title: Sexipede (2017)
programme.desc: Beautiful women make your erotic dreams come true.

programme.title: Jackass 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Steve-O and their fearless and foolhardy friends perform outrageous pranks and stunts, including "Sweatsuit Cocktail" and "Beehive Tetherball."

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: The Contractor (2022)
programme.desc: When his new assignment goes awry, an elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Most Wanted (2020)
programme.desc: An investigative reporter fights to expose the twisted truth behind a heroin bust orchestrated by dirty cops to frame an innocent man -- sentencing him to life in a Thai prison.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace (2008)
programme.desc: James Bond's (Daniel Craig) hunt for those responsible for Vesper Lynd's death leads him to a ruthless businessman (Mathieu Amalric) who is plotting to seize control of a valuable resource.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandora's box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace (2008)
programme.desc: James Bond's (Daniel Craig) hunt for those responsible for Vesper Lynd's death leads him to a ruthless businessman (Mathieu Amalric) who is plotting to seize control of a valuable resource.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley (2022)
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: The Contractor (2022)
programme.desc: When his new assignment goes awry, an elite soldier finds himself hunted and on the run, caught in a dangerous conspiracy and fighting to stay alive long enough to get home and uncover the true motives of those who betrayed him.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths (2012)
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter (Colin Farrell) finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends (Christopher Walken, Sam Rockwell) abduct a mobster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Stop-Loss (2008)
programme.desc: A soldier (Ryan Phillippe) whose tour of duty has ended takes matters into his own hands when the Army tries to force him back into active duty in Iraq.

programme.title: Breakdown (1997)
programme.desc: A man's (Kurt Russell) wife (Kathleen Quinlan) disappears in the desert Southwest after accepting a trucker's (J.T. Walsh) help with car trouble.

programme.title: Texas Rangers (2001)
programme.desc: Young men (James Van Der Beek, Dylan McDermott, Usher Raymond) band together to stop a ruthless bandit from engineering raids on cattle ranchers.

programme.title: Grudge Match (2013)
programme.desc: A boxing promoter (Kevin Hart) offers two rival boxers (Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone) the chance to come out of retirement for one final bout.

programme.title: Swingers (1996)
programme.desc: Would-be sultans of coolness help a socially inept friend find romance as they strut through Hollywood and Las Vegas.

programme.title: Killerman (2019)
programme.desc: Moe Diamond is a New York City money launderer who wakes up with no memory and millions of dollars in stolen cash and drugs. He must soon scour the streets in search of answers while trying to dodge a crew of violent and crooked cops.

programme.title: V for Vengeance (2022)
programme.desc: After learning that their younger sister escaped an earlier kidnapping attempt that also killed their parents, two estranged sisters must join forces to rescue her from a group of bloodthirsty vampires.

programme.title: Sahara (2005)
programme.desc: A treasure hunter (Matthew McConaughey) and his sidekick (Steve Zahn) join forces with a doctor (Penélope Cruz) to search for a Confederate ship in Africa.

programme.title: The Guilt Trip (2012)
programme.desc: Pressured into taking his overbearing mother along for the ride, a man embarks on the road trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: Last Weekend (2014)
programme.desc: Petty squabbling marks the Memorial Day reunion of an affluent matriarch (Patricia Clarkson) and her dysfunctional family (Chris Mulkey, Zachary Booth).

programme.title: Clouds of Sils Maria (2014)
programme.desc: A veteran actress (Juliette Binoche) comes face-to-face with an uncomfortable reflection of herself when she agrees to take part in a revival of the play that launched her career 20 years earlier.

programme.title: The Fan (1981)
programme.desc: Douglas, a record salesman, is an obsessive fan of actress Sally Ross. When his letters are rejected, he strikes out at her and her loved ones.

programme.title: Jenny's Wedding (2015)
programme.desc: When Jenny (Katherine Heigl) decides to marry a woman (Alexis Bledel), her conventional family must accept who she is or risk losing her forever.

programme.title: I Used to Go Here (2020)
programme.desc: A successful author finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students after being asked to speak at her alma mater.

programme.title: Love Me (2024)
programme.desc: A buoy and a satellite meet online long after humanity's extinction. As they learn what life was like on Earth, they discover themselves and what it means to be alive and in love.

programme.title: Regarding Us (2025)
programme.desc: After losing her teaching career, A transgender woman has a profound impact on the lives of two children.

programme.title: Stepping Out (1991)
programme.desc: A professional singer/dancer (Liza Minnelli) grooms her diverse amateur-dance class for a charity tap show.

programme.title: The Quiet American (2002)
programme.desc: A veteran English journalist (Michael Caine) and a young man (Brendan Fraser) vie for the affection of a Vietnamese woman (Do Thi Hai Yen) in the 1950s.

programme.title: Extraordinary Measures (2010)
programme.desc: After his two youngest children contract a fatal disease, a man (Brendan Fraser) joins forces with an unconventional scientist (Harrison Ford) in the hope of finding a cure.

programme.title: Outside Providence (1999)
programme.desc: After a young man (Shawn Hatosy) crashes into a police cruiser, his father sends him to boarding school where he struggles to be accepted.

programme.title: Rumours (2024)
programme.desc: Leaders of the world's wealthiest democracies become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods, and they realize they are suddenly alone.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Monstrous (2022)
programme.desc: A terrifying new horror awaits Laura and her 7-year-old son, Cody, when they flee her abusive ex-husband and try to settle into a new life. Still traumatized, their fragile existence is pushed to the breaking point.

programme.title: The Woman in Black (2012)
programme.desc: A widowed lawyer (Daniel Radcliffe) encounters ghostly goings-on at the foreboding estate of a recently deceased client.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A New York lawyer (Michael Douglas) with a wife (Anne Archer) and daughter sleeps with a client (Glenn Close) whose lust turns to hate.

programme.title: The Faculty (1998)
programme.desc: A group of small town High School students, including an introverted photographer and a drug dealer, begin to suspect something's off with their teachers. They realize that the faculty is under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites.

programme.title: Anything for Fame
programme.desc: Venturing into the virtual Wild West to profile a new breed of content creator.

programme.title: Rumours (2024)
programme.desc: Leaders of the world's wealthiest democracies become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods, and they realize they are suddenly alone.

programme.title: Miles to Go Before I Sleep
programme.desc: The relationships between musicians and their road crews and the importance of the people who work to put shows together.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridget's (Renée Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: Jersey Girl (2004)
programme.desc: A young woman (Liv Tyler) changes the life of a single father (Ben Affleck) who used to be a successful New York music publicist.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: Match Point (2005)
programme.desc: A one-time tennis professional (Jonathan Rhys-Meyers) becomes obsessed with his brother-in-law's (Matthew Goode) seductive fiancée (Scarlett Johansson).

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part (2017)
programme.desc: Michael and Madison Roland are a married couple; Michael Roland’s controlling behavior leads a pregnant Madison Roland to leave the home; she later discovers that her previous circumstances continue to affect her current life.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest (1981)
programme.desc: Movie queen Joan Crawford (Faye Dunaway) pampers and punishes her adopted son and daughter (Diana Scarwid).

programme.title: Losing Isaiah (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-crack addict (Halle Berry) fights for custody of her son adopted by a social worker (Jessica Lange) and her husband (David Strathairn).

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renée Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Unhook the Stars (1996)
programme.desc: A suburban widow (Gena Rowlands) fights with a daughter, befriends an abused neighbor's (Marisa Tomei) son and gains a trucker's (Gérard Depardieu) infatuation.

programme.title: Wishful Thinking (1996)
programme.desc: A young woman (Drew Barrymore) falls for her best friend (James LeGros) while he looks for the man his girlfriend (Jennifer Beals) is having an affair with.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet (2025)
programme.desc: Hoping to stay in the country, a gay man proposes a green card marriage to a female friend in exchange for paying for her IVF treatment. However, things get complicated when his grandmother surprises them with an extravagant Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: The Guilt Trip (2012)
programme.desc: Pressured into taking his overbearing mother along for the ride, a man embarks on the road trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three 50-ish college friends (Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton) plot revenge after their husbands dump them for younger women.

programme.title: View From the Top (2003)
programme.desc: A woman (Gwyneth Paltrow) from a small Nevada town makes friends while training to become a flight attendant.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: The Talented Mr. Ripley (1999)
programme.desc: A young man (Matt Damon) travels to 1950s Italy and begins to assume the identity of a playboy (Jude Law) he was hired to bring back to the United States.

programme.title: Atlantic City (1980)
programme.desc: A boardwalk numbers runner feels young again with a casino clam shucker and a lucky cocaine deal.
